zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Maude Norley於1308年出生在英國英格蘭爾盧可時，她的父親Henry De Honford III34歲，母親Margery Marjorie de Waleton78歲。她於1325年與Robert Legh在英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Maude Norley于1308年出生在英国英格兰爾盧可时，她的父亲Henry De Honford III34岁，母亲Margery Marjorie de Waleton78岁。她于1325年与Robert Legh在英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Norley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from one or more of the numerous places so called, such as Norley (Cheshire), Northleigh by Honiton and Northleigh in Goodleigh (both Devon), Norley Farm in Wonersh (Surrey), and Norley in Calne (Wilts). Most of the place-names derive from Middle English north ‘north, northern’ + ley ‘woodland clearing, glade’, also ‘open land’, or Old English norð ‘north, northern’ + lēah ‘open woodland’. Northleigh by Honiton (Devon) was recorded simply as Legh in 1228, with North- added later to distinguish it from nearby Southleigh.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Maude Norley was born in 1308, in Runcorn, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry De Honford III, was 34 and her mother, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, was 78. She married Robert Legh in 1325, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1375, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Maude Norley est née en 1308, à Runcorn, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry De Honford III, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, avait 78 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Legh en 1325, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1375, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Maude Norley 1308 in Runcorn, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry De Honford III 34 und ihre Mutter Margery Marjorie de Waleton 78. Sie hat 1325 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Legh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1375 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Maude Norley è nata il nel 1308 nel Runcorn, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry De Honford III, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, aveva 78 anni. Lei sposato Robert Legh nel 1325, nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1375, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Maude Norleyが1308年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアルンコルンで生まれた時，父Henry De Honford IIIは34歳，母Margery Marjorie de Waletonは78歳であった。1325年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドでRobert Leghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Maude Norley(이)가 1308년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 런코른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry De Honford III(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Marjorie de Waleton(은)는 78세였다. 그녀는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맥클스필드에서 Robert Legh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Maude Norley родилась в 1308 г. в местности рункорн, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry De Honford III было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Marjorie de Waleton, 78. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Legh в 1325 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1375 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Maude Norley nació en 1308, en Runcorn, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry De Honford III, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, tenía 78 años.
